game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Explore a strange world full of colorful friends and foes. When the time comes, the path you’ve chosen will determine your fate... and perhaps the fate of others as well.

Explore a strange world full of colorful friends and foes. Navigate through the vibrant and the mundane in order to uncover a forgotten past. When the time comes, the path you’ve chosen will determine your fate... and perhaps the fate of others as well.
game_info.description: Navigate through a mysterious world filled with colorful beings—some friendly, some hostile. Collect memory fragments scattered throughout the land to unlock the truth of your past. Your choices in helping or avoiding others will shape the final revelation. Reach the Portal of Truth with enough memories to discover your fate and influence the destiny of this strange realm.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Interact with friendly NPCs and collect memory fragments
Shift: Sprint (move faster, consumes stamina)
Z: Use protective shield (blocks damage, consumes energy)
Enter: Start game / ESC: Pause/Unpause / R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. Validates that the player can move in all directions, collect memory fragments, and interact with the game world without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move randomly through the world, attempt to collect nearby memory fragments, and interact with any NPCs encountered. Test all movement directions and basic mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves around the map, collects some memory fragments, and demonstrates all basic movement capabilities without game crashes or state errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy testing. Implements the best possible approach to win the game by efficiently collecting memory fragments and reaching the portal.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize collecting memory fragments while avoiding hostile entities. Use sprint strategically to reach fragments quickly. Navigate efficiently toward the Portal of Truth once enough memories are collected. Use shield when necessary to avoid damage.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state by collecting at least 10 memory fragments and reaching the Portal of Truth, demonstrating that the win condition is achievable through skilled play.

TEST_3.test_description: Combat and survival testing. Tests the player's ability to survive hostile encounters and use defensive mechanics effectively.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately engage with hostile entities while using the shield ability. Test stamina management and health regeneration mechanics. Validate collision detection and damage systems.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully uses shield to block attacks, manages resources effectively, and survives multiple hostile encounters without reaching game over, proving defensive mechanics work correctly.
